rawContent:
The current repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps, and no Azure DevOps organization is configured. I cannot query Azure DevOps pull requests without:

1. An Azure DevOps organization URL
2. A project name
3. A repository name (if different from default)

Please provide:
- Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`)
- The project name
- Optionally, the repository name
